fields.acceptance_criteria: Define and execute a source-of-truth cleanup plan for moved context-stack tools, including sequencing, reference updates, and any temporary compatibility boundaries.
fields.title: Decide post-import ownership cleanup for context-stack tools
fields.validation_plan: Review root and standalone workspace manifests, grep for stale tool-path references, and run focused validation on any repository surface changed by the cleanup decision.

fields.acceptance_criteria: Define and execute a source-of-truth cleanup plan for moved context-stack tools, including sequencing, reference updates, temporary compatibility boundaries where needed, and explicit validation that ownership is unambiguous.
fields.title: Decide post-import ownership cleanup for context-stack tools
fields.validation_plan: Review root and standalone workspace manifests, grep for stale tool-path references, confirm source and target ownership is explicit after each cleanup step, and run focused validation on every repository surface changed by the cleanup decision.

fields.acceptance_criteria: Define and execute a source-of-truth cleanup plan for moved context-stack tools, including sequencing, reference updates, temporary compatibility boundaries where needed, and explicit validation that ownership is unambiguous.
fields.title: Decide post-import ownership cleanup for context-stack tools
fields.validation_plan: Review root and standalone workspace manifests, grep for stale tool-path references, confirm source and target ownership is explicit after each cleanup step, and run focused validation on every repository surface changed by the cleanup decision.
